alertMessage: [刷单预警]${KafkaEventDTO.eventAttrMap.bankName}(${KafkaEventDTO.eventAttrMap.bankId}): 花积分用户(${KafkaEventDTO.targetValue})，最近${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.0.windowValue}${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.0.windowUnit}内下单金额为${ProcessorDTO.eventFieldAndValueSumMap.orderAmount}，超过${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.0.threshold}次；且最近${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.1.windowValue}${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.1.windowUnit}内下单数量为${ProcessorDTO.eventFieldAndValueSumMap.orderCount}，超过${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.1.threshold}次；触发预警的商品为：${KafkaEventDTO.eventAttrMap.productName}(${KafkaEventDTO.eventAttrMap.productId})。请您及时查看原因！
